item.title: Okayama, Japan.
item.description: Okayama is the capital city of it's namesake prefecture, in western Japan. It’s known for the 16th-century Okayama Castle, dubbed “Crow Castle” for its black exterior, and for Korakuen, an iconic formal garden. The Hayashibara Museum of Art shows East Asian art and artifacts. The Okayama Prefectural Museum of Art displays regional works. To the west, 15th-century Kibitsu-jinja Shrine features a long, covered walkway.
item.dc:creator: dolphinyaso

item.title: Sailor Strange
item.description: I spent way too much time animating a very stupid joke.
item.dc:creator: BecauseBenjamin

item.title: Scenes from the National Nurses' March
item.description:
Nurses have been planning this day for months to unify for the purpose of supporting safe staffing/ratios, supporting measures to ensure hospitals support safety/ violence reduction for staff. opposing state-supported caps on nurse pay ("free market for me, not for thee"), and reducing disparities and racial prejudice in the profession. Met these great ladies right off the train station! They approved of my sign.
Got there a little late due to a work meeting, but I made it!
Back of the sign, admittedly stolen from one of Orisa's new voice lines in Overwatch 2 but it's exactly what I wanted to say!
Nurse Nander delivered a great speech!
Loved these ladies. Impactful message.
Grateful for my brothers and sisters for speaking loudly and clearly! Our profession has historical defects that we must contend with.
Love the spice (JCAHO, a.k.a. Joint Commission, is supposed to audit safe practices in hospitals...curiously, they were nowhere to be found or heard when nurses raised the alarm about unsafe conditions during the pandemic!)
We honor our fallen through advocacy and action.
All too real. Try to imagine bathing, toileting, feeding, giving medicine, assessing, and comforting 40 people in 12h...pro tip: it is not humanly possible.
One of our recurring themes: we are humans, and as such, require conditions conducive to humans, NOT superheroes.
We came here for a reason.
item.dc:creator: Guluzinyu

item.title: Does anyone actually believe this will go anywhere? Or will it simply get stalled (or filibustered)?
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: Life sucks need to vent
item.description:
After years of fertility issues and treatments we were finally going to have our baby. Catch covid just as we started to get excited and start buying stuff. Too much shit has happened for us not to be pessimistic hence why we took so long to start buying stuff.
Luckily still entitled to maternity leave when you get that far into a pregnancy in Scotland so took some of that time to come to terms with what had happened and make sure I was mentally able to go back to work. After 1 week of reduced hours back at work, test comes back positive.
After my isolation I went back to work at my usual 40 hrs. Gran dies that week. She had really bad dementia and it got to the point where we’re just relieved she’s not in pain anymore, we were all still heartbroken though.
Funeral was on Tuesday and had a much harder time coping with it than I thought I would. Got the news this morning that my mum’s friend died last night. My mum had to watch her mother die last Wednesday then was with her friend at the hospital when she died just 1 week later. It’s been a shit time lately and I’m 100% sure my mum isn’t coping but she’s adamant she’s fine. Trying to be there for her as much as I can until she comes to terms with everything that has happened. Here’s a puppy
item.dc:creator: MissDisney91

item.title: Good things are happening. Russians tried to cross Siverskyi Donets river. It did not go so well. 73 equipment annihilated. Typical Russian, thats not the first time they tried to cross this river at the exact location.

item.title: When the group of open minded ladies on their girls night out give you this look at the hotel bar…

item.title: The 112th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 15 - Puppers and Doggos pt. 4 - Goldies & Labs
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones. I'm still looking for suggestions on where to put my Imgur Stickers! https://imgur.com/gallery/TTINc5R
Pupper is excited!
sorry about the pixels
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
So these ones didn't have sound when I stole them. Sorry.
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Puppers #Sound_On #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 61 https://imgur.com/gallery/VNlNlNX - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. IV Vol 62 https://imgur.com/gallery/5BAeeTJ - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. V Vol 63 https://imgur.com/gallery/SZlkuUY - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. VI Vol 64 https://imgur.com/gallery/KBtYW2X - Obvious Plant (and the like) Vol 65 https://imgur.com/gallery/4tggfcY - BEEEEEEEEEESSSSS!!! Vol 66 https://imgur.com/gallery/sl4sRV7 Vol 67 https://imgur.com/gallery/DR4LbNI Vol 68 https://imgur.com/gallery/H4ipoO9 - D&Dump - Image Edition Vol 69 https://imgur.com/gallery/WhH54f2 - D&Dump - Reading Edition Vol 70 https://imgur.com/gallery/pAoobS6 Vol 71 https://imgur.com/gallery/zmZF53H Vol 72 https://imgur.com/gallery/StUTVA7 Vol 73 https://imgur.com/gallery/ZXblzC0 Vol 74 https://imgur.com/gallery/1rWvTNc Vol 75 https://imgur.com/gallery/EaMatw6 Vol 76 https://imgur.com/gallery/DB7XXis Vol 77 https://imgur.com/gallery/P76BUQW Vol 78 https://imgur.com/gallery/GpUx9JD Vol 79 https://imgur.com/gallery/KEfEp2k Vol 80 https://imgur.com/gallery/MMkm8Fq Vol 81 https://imgur.com/gallery/rFCfCH9 Vol 82 https://imgur.com/gallery/EFIGQGf Vol 83 https://imgur.com/gallery/2sJkh1h Vol 84 https://imgur.com/gallery/hunUWUD Vol 85 https://imgur.com/gallery/G96GtGQ Vol 86 https://imgur.com/gallery/ihADXqJ Vol 87 https://imgur.com/gallery/iTlb6z7 Vol 88 https://imgur.com/gallery/4XXmRVg Vol 89 https://imgur.com/gallery/cX2uRd2 - FROG EDITION v.
